requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series for PV Inverters — INTECO / ICE / ARESEP Interconnection, 60 Hz Context
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列——INTECO / ICE / ARESEP并网，60 Hz背景
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列——INTECO / ICE / ARESEP併網，60 Hz背景

summary.en: INTECO adopts IEC standards for Costa Rica, including IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and the IEC 61000 series (Electromagnetic compatibility). For PV inverters connected to Costa Rica's 60 Hz / 120-240 V grid under ARESEP's generación distribuida para autoconsumo scheme, EMC compliance evidence is expected as part of the technical documentation package reviewed by ICE and the licensed distributors (CNFL, Coopeguanacaste, JASEC, ESPH). Key EMC standards applicable to PV inverters in Costa Rica include: IEC 62920 (dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment), IEC 61000-3-2 (harmonic current emission limits for equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase), and IEC 61000-3-3 (voltage fluctuations and flicker). Because Costa Rica's grid operates at 60 Hz rather than 50 Hz, harmonic current emission profiles and EMC measurements obtained under 50 Hz conditions may differ from those under 60 Hz conditions; project owners and distributors may require EMC evidence specifically validated at 60 Hz.
summary.zh: INTECO为哥斯达黎加采用IEC标准，包括IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000系列（电磁兼容）。在ARESEP「分布式自用发电」方案下接入哥斯达黎加60 Hz / 120-240 V电网的光伏逆变器，EMC合规证据作为ICE和持牌配电商（CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC、ESPH）审查的技术文件包的一部分是必要的。适用于哥斯达黎加光伏逆变器的关键EMC标准包括：IEC 62920（光伏功率变换设备专用EMC标准）、IEC 61000-3-2（每相输入电流不超过16 A设备的谐波电流排放限值）和IEC 61000-3-3（电压波动和闪烁）。由于哥斯达黎加电网工作在60 Hz而非50 Hz，在50 Hz条件下获得的谐波电流排放特征和EMC测量结果可能与60 Hz条件下不同；项目业主和配电商可能要求在60 Hz下专门验证的EMC证据。
summary.zht: INTECO為哥斯大黎加採用IEC標準，包括IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000系列（電磁相容）。在ARESEP「分散式自用發電」方案下接入哥斯大黎加60 Hz / 120-240 V電網的光伏逆變器，EMC合規證據作為ICE和持牌配電商（CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC、ESPH）審查的技術文件包的一部分是必要的。適用於哥斯大黎加光伏逆變器的關鍵EMC標準包括：IEC 62920（光伏功率轉換設備專用EMC標準）、IEC 61000-3-2（每相輸入電流不超過16 A設備的諧波電流排放限值）和IEC 61000-3-3（電壓波動和閃爍）。由於哥斯大黎加電網工作在60 Hz而非50 Hz，在50 Hz條件下取得的諧波電流排放特徵和EMC測量結果可能與60 Hz條件下不同；項目業主和配電商可能要求在60 Hz下專門驗證的EMC證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (INTECO adoption, applicable to Costa Rica PV inverters)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase)
IEC 61000-3-3 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker
INTECO — Instituto de Normas Técnicas de Costa Rica — national standards body, adopts IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 series

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic regulatory framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories under China's 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid conditions. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods referenced in Chinese domestic standards, GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as expected by INTECO and Costa Rica's distributors. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for Costa Rica interconnection submissions. Furthermore, Chinese EMC test results obtained at 50 Hz may not adequately represent EMC performance at 60 Hz, particularly for harmonic current emissions where the harmonic spectrum shifts with operating frequency.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）评估，其中包含与中国国内监管框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室按中国50 Hz / 220-380 V电网条件进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了中国国内标准引用的IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和限值未与INTECO及哥斯达黎加配电商预期的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调。仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被接受为哥斯达黎加并网提交所需的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。此外，在50 Hz下获得的中国EMC测试结果可能不足以代表60 Hz下的EMC性能，特别是对于谐波电流排放（谐波频谱随工作频率变化）。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）評估，其中包含與中國國內監管框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室按中國50 Hz / 220-380 V電網條件進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了中國國內標準引用的IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和限值未與INTECO及哥斯大黎加配電商預期的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調。僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被接受為哥斯大黎加併網提交所需的IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。此外，在50 Hz下取得的中國EMC測試結果可能不足以代表60 Hz下的EMC性能，特別是對於諧波電流排放（諧波頻譜隨工作頻率變化）。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters — China domestic, 50 Hz-based, includes EMC test requirements)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy INTECO/IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 expectations for Costa Rica PV inverter interconnection. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model and power rating; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model. Given that Costa Rica operates at 60 Hz rather than 50 Hz, confirm with the project engineer and relevant distributor (ICE, CNFL, Coopeguanacaste, JASEC, or ESPH) whether IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 test results obtained at 50 Hz are acceptable or whether retesting at 60 Hz is required. Harmonic current spectra differ between 50 Hz and 60 Hz operation — retesting at 60 Hz is the conservative and technically defensible approach.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足哥斯达黎加光伏逆变器并网的INTECO/IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2预期要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖特定逆变器型号和功率等级的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。鉴于哥斯达黎加工作在60 Hz而非50 Hz，请与项目工程师及相关配电商（ICE、CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH）确认在50 Hz下获得的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2测试结果是否可接受，或是否需要在60 Hz下重新测试。谐波电流频谱在50 Hz和60 Hz运行下不同——在60 Hz下重新测试是保守且在技术上可辩护的做法。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足哥斯大黎加光伏逆變器併網的INTECO/IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2預期要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋特定逆變器型號和功率等級的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。鑒於哥斯大黎加工作在60 Hz而非50 Hz，請與項目工程師及相關配電商（ICE、CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH）確認在50 Hz下取得的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2測試結果是否可接受，或是否需要在60 Hz下重新測試。諧波電流頻譜在50 Hz和60 Hz運行下不同——在60 Hz下重新測試是保守且在技術上可辯護的做法。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for ICE and distributor interconnection review under ARESEP generación distribuida para autoconsumo where IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 evidence is part of the expected technical documentation package; INTECO adoption of these standards makes them the applicable Costa Rica framework
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification only; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters; does not substitute for IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2 in Costa Rica

source.publisher: INTECO (Instituto de Normas Técnicas de Costa Rica)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy INTECO/IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 expectations for Costa Rica PV inverter interconnection review. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model. Because Costa Rica's grid operates at 60 Hz rather than 50 Hz, confirm with the relevant distributor (ICE at grupoice.com, or CNFL, Coopeguanacaste, JASEC, or ESPH) whether 50 Hz test results are accepted or whether retesting at 60 Hz is required — retesting at 60 Hz is the conservative approach given the shift in harmonic current spectrum between frequencies. Verify current INTECO standard adoption status directly at inteco.org before finalising the EMC compliance documentation package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足哥斯达黎加光伏逆变器并网审查的INTECO/IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2预期要求。请从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。由于哥斯达黎加电网工作在60 Hz而非50 Hz，请向相关配电商（ICE：grupoice.com，或CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH）确认是否接受50 Hz测试结果或是否需要在60 Hz下重新测试——鉴于不同频率下谐波电流频谱的变化，在60 Hz下重新测试是保守做法。在最终确定EMC合规文件包前，请直接在inteco.org核实当前INTECO标准采纳状态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足哥斯大黎加光伏逆變器併網審查的INTECO/IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2預期要求。請從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。由於哥斯大黎加電網工作在60 Hz而非50 Hz，請向相關配電商（ICE：grupoice.com，或CNFL、Coopeguanacaste、JASEC或ESPH）確認是否接受50 Hz測試結果或是否需要在60 Hz下重新測試——鑒於不同頻率下諧波電流頻譜的變化，在60 Hz下重新測試是保守做法。在最終確定EMC合規文件包前，請直接在inteco.org核實當前INTECO標準採納狀態。
